ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, running, completed, failed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment ended */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment */,
  "last_ran_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last ran the experiment */,
  "last_ran_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the result belongs to */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the experiment */,
  "step" INTEGER /* Step number within the iteration */,
  "fold" INTEGER /* Fold number within the step */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value of the model */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area Under the Curve (AUC) value */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix as a JSON object */,
  "additional_metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics as a JSON object */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Machine learning framework used */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the model as a JSON object */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "test_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the test data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_models" (
  "experiment_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-model link */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model used in the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the experiment-model link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_models_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was granted */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date of the access */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the access */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_granted_by FOREIGN KEY ("granted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
